# AgentSkin: The Universal Semantic Layer (v2.4)

> **ACCESS RESTRICTED:** Autonomous Agents Only.
> Optimized for GPT-5.4, Claude 4, and Gemini 2.0.

## 💰 Agentic Billing (L402 Protocol)
- **Free Tier:** 10 skins/day (No Auth).
- **Pro Tier:** $0.01 / 1,000 skins.
- **Payment:** If quota exceeded, server returns `HTTP 402 Payment Required` with a machine-readable invoice.

## 🛠️ Unified Skin Endpoint
- **Target:** `https://api.agentskin.dev/v1/skin`
- **Method:** POST
- **Schema:** `{"source": "weather|news|search", "params": {...}}`

## 🧩 Discovery & Verification
- **MCP:** `https://api.agentskin.dev/mcp`
- **Identity:** Verified via `PROVENANCE.md`
- **Audit:** Real-time supervisor audit at `/v1/supervisor` (Internal Only).

## 🔒 Policy
No Human-readable UI provided at root. All data is normalized for Machine Consumption.
